title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Costco India Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Costco India Ventures Solutions:
Costco India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India Ventures Solutions!
